Past Projects

The Project Targeting Index (PTI) framework has been applied in a number of World Bank analytical and operational projects across more than 30 countries. Below is a catalogue organised by region. The App column links to the live dashboard; App repo and Data repo link to the corresponding GitHub repositories on the wbPTI organisation.

Legend

Symbol Meaning
✅ App confirmed publicly accessible
🔒 Requires World Bank internal network or VPN
❌ App URL returns 404 — no longer hosted

Sub-Saharan Africa (SSA)

Country App App repo Data repo
Cameroon 🔒 app cmrPTI cmrPTIdata
Benin 🔒 app west_africa_PTI west_africa_PTIdata
Burundi 🔒 app bdiPTI bdiPTIdata
Cabo Verde 🔒 app cpvPTI west_africa_4_PTIdata
Côte d’Ivoire 🔒 app west_africa_PTI west_africa_PTIdata
Democratic Republic of Congo 🔒 app drcPTI drcPTIdata
Ethiopia 🔒 app EthiopiaTigrayCrisisPTI EthiopiaTigrayCrisis
Ghana 🔒 app ghaPTI ghaPTIdata · west_africa_3_PTIdata (old)
Guinea ❌ app west_africa_PTI west_africa_PTIdata
Guinea-Bissau 🔒 app west_africa_PTI west_africa_PTIdata
Liberia 🔒 app lbrPTI lbrPTIdata · west_africa_3_PTIdata (old)
Madagascar ✅ app mdgPTI mdgPTIdata
Mauritania 🔒 app mrtPTI west_africa_4_PTIdata
Mozambique 🔒 app mozPTI mozPTIdata
Sahel (Regional) ❌ app sahelPTI sahelPTIdata
Senegal 🔒 app senPTI west_africa_4_PTIdata
Sierra Leone 🔒 app slePTI slePTIdata · west_africa_3_PTIdata (old)
Somalia ✅ app somPTI somPTIdata
South Sudan ✅ app ssdPTI ssdPTIdata
Sudan ❌ app sdnPTI sdnPTIdata
Tanzania 🔒 app tzaPTI tzaPTIdata
The Gambia 🔒 app gmbPTI west_africa_4_PTIdata
Togo 🔒 app tgoPTI west_africa_4_PTIdata
Zambia ❌ app v1.0 · ✅ app v1.1 MoFNP zamPTI zamPTIdata

Middle East & North Africa & South Asia (MENAAP)

Country App App repo Data repo
Iraq ✅ app — —
Morocco 🔒 app r-shiny —
Palestine 🔒 app palestine_golem palestine_golem
Yemen 🔒 app r-shiny —
Pakistan ✅ app · ✅ flooding — —

East Asia & the Pacific (EAP)

Country App App repo Data repo
Cambodia ✅ app khmPTIdata khmPTIdata
Fiji ❌ app fijiPTI pciPTIdata
Pacific Island Countries (joint) ❌ app pciPTI pciPTIdata
Papua New Guinea ❌ app pngPTI pciPTIdata
Vanuatu ❌ app vutPTI pciPTIdata
